title: Will any U.S. House member visit Iran before Jul 1, 2026?

current.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 0%, modal NO) — staying out.
current.rationale_summary: There is currently no evidence of any U.S. House member visiting Iran before July 1, 2026. However, given the historical precedent of U.S. officials engaging in diplomatic outreach to Iran, especially during periods of political change or negotiation, there remains a non-trivial possibility that a House member might make such a visit. The lack of confirmed news or statements does not rule out the
key_drivers: Absence of confirmed reports or statements about such a visit
Historical precedent of U.S. officials engaging with Iran in diplomatic contexts
Potential for unexpected political developments influencing such actions
reference_classes: Diplomatic visits by U.S. officials to countries with which the U.S. has tense relations
Legislative outreach to foreign nations in the context of policy discussions

history.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 2%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: No sitting US House member has visited Iran in the modern era; with an active conflict, a Level 4 advisory, and no planned CODEL, a visit before July 1 is virtually impossible (marginally above Rubio as an informal trip is less institutionally constrained).
key_drivers: no modern sitting-member visits
active conflict
Level 4 advisory
no planned CODEL
reference_classes: 0 known sitting House-member visits to Iran

history.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 3%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: All US-Iran engagement is in neutral venues (Geneva/Switzerland/Rome), not Tehran; no House member traveling to Iran; physically near-unprecedented. Corrected down from local overestimate.
key_drivers: talks in neutral venues not Tehran
no House travel to Iran
near-unprecedented
reference_classes: US officials physically visiting Iran post-1979

history.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 2%, modal NO) — staying out.
history.rationale_summary: No US House member has visited Iran since 1979 and none is reported planning one; the slight bump only reflects the 435-member pool and unannounced-visit tail risk.
key_drivers: 435-member pool
no precedent

reference_classes: House member trips to Iran since 1979 ~ zero
